scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd .. && npm run cert
scripts.dev: IP=$(ifconfig | grep 'inet ' | grep -v '127.0.0.1' | head -n 1 | awk '{print $2}') && echo "\n\x1b[36mLocal:   http://localhost:8000/\x1b[0m" && echo "\x1b[36mNetwork: https://$IP:8000/\x1b[0m\n" && concurrently -n 'server,client' -c 'red,green' "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
